summary: Building a full frontend clone inspired by Synima's AI Video Agency website. Includes all sections: hero, services, portfolio/showreel, pricing, testimonials, contact form, with animations and interactivity using placeholder branding and demo content.
architectural_notes: Frontend-only project (no backend), using placeholder branding and demo content
Inspired by Synima AI Video Agency website design and layout

existing_features.title: Create a Hero section with a bold animated headline (typewriter or fade-in effect), a short tagline about AI-powered video production, a primary CTA button ('Get Started' / 'Watch Showreel'), and a full-bleed cinematic background (dark overlay with abstract motion or video-style visual).

Create a Services section that showcases AI video agency offerings with icon cards or feature tiles. Include at least 6 services such as: AI Video Production, Script Writing, Motion Graphics, Brand Films, Social Content, and Post-Production. Each card should have an icon, title, and short description.

Create a Portfolio / Showreel section with a featured video embed (use a YouTube embed as placeholder, e.g. a generic showreel URL) and a grid of 4–6 project thumbnails below it. Each thumbnail should display a project title and category tag on hover.

Create a Pricing section with 3 pricing tiers (Starter, Pro, Enterprise) displayed as cards. Include a monthly/annual billing toggle that updates displayed prices. Each card should list features with checkmarks, highlight the recommended plan, and include a CTA button.

Create a Testimonials section displaying 4–6 client reviews as cards or a carousel. Each testimonial should include a client avatar (placeholder image or initials), name, company, star rating, and review text.

Create a Contact section with a styled form containing fields for Name, Email, Company, Service Interest (dropdown), and Message. Include a Submit button and a brief intro text. Add a secondary column or row with contact info (email, phone, location — placeholder values).
Add a sticky top navigation bar with the agency logo/name, links to all sections (smooth scroll), and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button. On mobile, collapse into a hamburger menu.
Add a Footer with the agency name/logo, navigation links, social media icon links (placeholder), a short tagline, and a copyright line.

Implement smooth scroll-triggered entrance animations throughout the page (fade-in-up on section headings, staggered card reveals, etc.) using CSS transitions or a lightweight animation approach. Add subtle hover micro-interactions on buttons and cards.

Apply a cinematic, premium dark-theme visual design with a deep charcoal/near-black background, vivid accent colors (e.g. electric teal or amber-orange gradient), sleek sans-serif typography, and high-contrast white text. Enforce this theme consistently across all sections, using glassmorphism or subtle glow effects for cards where appropriate.

Update the Navbar component to include a fullscreen overlay menu that opens when the hamburger icon is clicked on any screen size (not just mobile). The fullscreen overlay should cover the entire viewport with a dark/glassmorphism background matching the site's cinematic theme. Inside the overlay, display large navigation links: Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, and Contact — each smooth-scrolling to the respective section. Include an animated close button (X) to dismiss the overlay. The open/close transition should use smooth animated entrance/exit effects (e.g. fade-in + slide or scale). The existing desktop navigation links in the navbar should remain visible alongside the hamburger icon trigger.

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with animated headline and CTA
Services section showcasing AI video agency offerings
Smooth scroll animations and interactive UI throughout
Fullscreen hamburger menu overlay with navigation links (Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact) and animated open/close transitions
